name: corporate-finance-tax
description: 企业财务和税务管理工具，覆盖财务分析、记账凭证、预算分析、增值税管理、汇算清缴、内部审计、财务报表编制和月结管理九大场景。适用于会计记账、税务申报、财务诊断、预算管控、合规审计、报表编制和月末关账。触发词："财务分析"、"杜邦分析"、"做凭证"、"记账"、"会计分录"、"增值税"、"税负率"、"进销项"、"汇算清缴"、"纳税调整"、"税前扣除"、"预算差异"、"预实对比"、"内部审计"、"审计底稿"、"内控评价"、"SOX审计"、"编制报表"、"资产负债表"、"利润表"、"现金流量表"、"月结"、"关账"、"对账"。
descriptionEn: Corporate finance and tax management toolkit covering financial analysis, journal entries, budget analysis, VAT management, annual CIT settlement, internal audit, financial statement preparation, and month-end closing. Suited for bookkeeping, tax filing, financial diagnostics, budget control, compliance auditing, statement preparation, and period-end closing. Trigger words: "financial analysis", "DuPont analysis", "journal entry", "bookkeeping", "accounting entry", "VAT", "tax burden rate", "input/output VAT", "annual CIT settlement", "tax adjustment", "pre-tax deduction", "budget variance", "budget vs actual", "internal audit", "audit working papers", "internal control evaluation", "SOX audit", "prepare statements", "balance sheet", "income statement", "cash flow statement", "month-end closing", "book closing", "reconciliation".
